race.comment: KING POTTER (6) returns for the Archibalds and has been readied with two soft trials. Never got going last time in but his debut prep was promising. Bullock's booking signals stable confidence. PIXIE HALLOW (1) didn't give his rivals a sniff at Grafton when leading pillar-to-post. Is a five-time winner over this trip and keeps the claimer to aid the big weight. Have to take him seriously. THE PICCOLINO (8) returns and is a speedy type. Has been readied with two trials and is drawn favourably. May need the hit-out but is expected to give backers a sight. BJORN IRONSIDE (4) only warmed late when resuming at Port Macquarie in tougher company. Better for the run and gets help at the weights with the claimer going on. Don't underestimate.
